1.question: How do I reset my password?
1.answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login screen, enter your email address, and fill out your new password to update your login credentials.

2.question: Do you offer refunds?
2.answer: Yes, we offer a 14-day money-back guarantee for all our premium billing subscriptions. Please submit a billing support ticket to request a refund.

3.question: What integrations are supported?
3.answer: DeskFlow AI supports native integrations with Slack, HubSpot, Jira, Salesforce, WhatsApp, and Shopify out of the box.

4.question: How does the AI chatbot work?
4.answer: Our Zia AI Chatbot automatically reads customer messages, queries the local Help Center / FAQ Knowledge Base, performs sentiment checks, and resolves up to 80% of issues. It will escalate the conversation to a human support agent if it receives terms like 'human' or 'agent'.

5.question: How do I enable two-factor authentication (2FA)?
5.answer: Go to Profile Settings, click Security, then enable Two-Factor Authentication. You will receive a verification code via email each time you log in. We recommend enabling 2FA for all accounts to protect your data.

6.question: My account is locked. How do I unlock it?
6.answer: Accounts get locked after 5 failed login attempts. To unlock your account, click 'Forgot Password' to reset credentials, or open a support ticket with your registered email and our team will manually unlock it within 1 hour.

7.question: How do I download my invoice?
7.answer: Log in to your account, navigate to Billing in the Settings panel, and click 'Download Invoice' next to any completed billing cycle. Invoices are available in PDF format and sent automatically to your registered email after each payment.

8.question: How do I cancel my subscription?
8.answer: To cancel your subscription, go to Settings > Billing > Subscription and click 'Cancel Plan'. Your access will remain active until the end of the current billing period. No further charges will be made after cancellation.

9.question: What are the API rate limits?
9.answer: DeskFlow AI enforces a rate limit of 1000 API requests per minute per API key. If you exceed this limit, you will receive a 429 Too Many Requests response. Contact support to request an increased rate limit for enterprise plans.

10.question: What are your support hours?
10.answer: Our human support agents are available Monday–Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM IST. The Zia AI chatbot is available 24/7 and can resolve most common issues instantly. For urgent issues outside business hours, open a High-priority ticket and it will be addressed first thing the next business day.

11.question: How do I request a new feature?
11.answer: We love customer feedback! To request a new feature, open a support ticket with the category 'Feature Request' and describe the feature in detail. Our product team reviews all feature requests and posts updates to our public roadmap monthly.

12.question: Where can I view the product roadmap?
12.answer: Our public product roadmap is updated every month and reflects customer-voted features, bug fixes, and upcoming releases. You can view it at deskflow.ai/roadmap. Voting on existing items helps us prioritize what gets built first.

4xanbcd0f7x.question: Getting charged twice for the exact same item or service
4xanbcd0f7x.answer: Always request an itemized receipt to verify charges, and contact customer support immediately to initiate a charge dispute or request a refund.
